### last time

*  groups of addresses stay together
  *  all of stack
  *  everything from an executable
  *  everything from a dynamic library
*  working from information leaks
  *  compute random offset for ASLR
*  cost to do ASLR
  *  jump tables wanting hard-coded addresses in execs
  *  32-bit x86 and not having %rip-relative addressing

{{< include /rop/_talk-inner.qmd >}}
